name: Chocolate Mint Refresher
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cold, freshly brewed coffee with the creme de cacao.
2. Add the white creme de menthe and light cream to the mixture.
3. Blend until frothy.
4. Pour over ice.
Nutritional analysis per serving: 244 calories; 10.5 grams total fat (28 percent of calories from fat); 33.4 milligrams cholesterol; 42.8 milligrams sodium.
